summary: Mobile Payroll Summary testing - Section is WORKING CORRECTLY on mobile viewport (390x844). All functionality verified: expand, collapse, re-expand. Shows Current Pay Period ($225.00, 11.3 hrs), Month Total ($225.00), Year Total ($225.00), and Pay Period Settings.

issues: Minor horizontal overflow of 8px detected (scrollWidth 398px vs viewportWidth 390px) - does not affect functionality

admin_login_mobile.details: Admin code '4399' successfully logs in as Matthew Guzman on mobile viewport

payroll_summary_expand.details: Section expands correctly when toggle is clicked on mobile

payroll_summary_settings.details: Pay Period Settings section visible with 'Feb 18 - Mar 3, 2026' and '11.3 hrs tracked'

payroll_summary_collapse.details: Section collapses correctly when toggle is clicked again

js_console_errors.details: No JavaScript errors detected in console

context_for_next_testing_agent: Payroll Summary section on mobile is working correctly. User-reported issue could not be reproduced. Possible causes: (1) User may have had a network issue causing API data not to load, (2) User may have been on a different/older version, (3) User may have experienced a transient animation glitch. Minor horizontal overflow of 8px detected but doesn't affect functionality.
issue_resolution_note: COULD NOT REPRODUCE - The user reported 'payroll summary is not working on mobile preview'. After thorough testing with multiple expand/collapse cycles, all functionality works correctly. The section expands, shows all data (Current Pay Period, Month Total, Year Total), collapses, and re-expands properly. No JavaScript errors detected.
